title: 5144 Massachusetts Ave
description: Just taken to market: an architecturally distinguished church property zoned R-60 in a premier Bethesda location. The property generates strong interim income — a Montessori School tenant on a month-to-month lease at $7,000/mo and Verizon & T-Mobile cellular equipment in the steeple producing an additional ~$7,000/mo in combined revenue. Significant land component and zoning may offer long-term redevelopment or repositioning potential (buyer to verify). A rare opportunity to acquire a high-quality institutional asset with immediate cash flow and compelling future upside.

title: 7272 & 7274 Cradlerock Way
description: Two adjacent two-story townhome office condominiums in Owen Brown Village, near Lake Elkhorn and adjacent to Giant Food and McDonald's with quick access to Routes 29, 32, and 175. Each unit offers a split-level layout with a main-level lobby, three offices/treatment rooms upstairs and three more downstairs, private restrooms on both levels, and a walkout patio. Unit 7272 is also available for lease at $3,500/mo ($27.50/SF modified gross). Purchase either unit individually or both together — ideal for an owner-user or professional practice.

title: 5721–25 Main Street
description: A B1-zoned corner property at Main Street and Furnace Road, improved by an approximately 3,200 SF metal warehouse with five drive-in doors and an approximately 4,612 SF mixed-use office building with a residential component. One block from Route 1 at the entrances to I-895, I-195, and Route 100, roughly seven minutes from BWI-Thurgood Marshall Airport. Historic zoning may entitle the owner to certain tax credits for improvements (buyer to verify). Both structures need substantial work — a strong value-add or redevelopment opportunity in a high-visibility location.
